steps.title: Locate the key percentage in the passage
steps.content: The passage specifies that 14.22 percent of games remain available. This exact percentage is the signal you need to find in the table.

steps.title: Match the percentage to the correct time period
steps.content: Scanning the table, 14.22% corresponds to the 1995–1999 row. Choice A (2000–2004) and choice C (1970–1974) do not appear in the table, and choice D (1985–1989) shows 15.38%, not 14.22%. That leaves B.
